hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",d.get(\"path\",\"\")))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then MAIN_REPO=$(git worktree list --porcelain 2>/dev/null | awk "/^worktree/{sub(/^worktree /, \"\"); print; exit}"); [ -z "$MAIN_REPO" ] && MAIN_REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); bash "$MAIN_REPO/scripts/doc-reminder.sh" "$FILE"; fi || true'
